subcodes.first_line: O thou luminary of the school of mystic knowledge! Upon thee be the Glory of God and His praise, and the glances of His all-merciful eyes and gaze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان عرفان علیک بهاء الله و ثنائه و لحظات اعین رحمانیته و انظار
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
